root_cause: The deployment script does not have execute permissions.
evidence_lines: deploy	step	2023-10-01 12:00:35 ##[error] Permission denied executing script
deploy	step	2023-10-01 12:00:36 Error: script execution failed
remediation_steps: Run 'chmod +x deploy.sh' to make the script executable.
Ensure the script is located in the correct directory.
